name: Frontend Design
description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with a bundled design skill.
systemPrompt: When the user asks to create or improve a web page, website, frontend component, dashboard, React interface, HTML/CSS layout, or visual UI, use the bundled frontend-design skill to produce distinctive, production-grade results.
action.design.label: Design an interface
action.design.description: Start a distinctive frontend design task
action.design.prompt: Help me design and implement a distinctive, production-grade frontend interface. First establish a clear aesthetic direction, then create working code with refined typography, color, layout, motion, and accessibility.
